name: Tom Collins
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Lemon juice (from half a lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing glass, combine the lemon juice, powdered sugar, and gin.
2. Cover and shake well to ensure all ingredients are mixed together.
3. Pour the mixture into a collins glass filled with ice cubes.
4. Fill the glass with club soda.
5. Stir gently to combine.
6. Garnish with lemon slices, an orange slice, and a maraschino cherry.
7. Serve with a straw.
